summary: Amended filing shows larger derivative-linked position

headline: Should Ryan Cohen be taken seriously as an eBay investor?
summary: Today’s Opening Bid panel, led by Executive Editor Brian Sozzi, tackles the show’s question of the day: Should GameStop (GME) CEO Ryan Cohen be taken seriously as an investor in eBay? The panel debates what Cohen’s involvement could mean for the company and investors.

headline: 28% of Americans Have a Side Hustle; Most Started One to Cover Everyday Expenses
summary: New research by Omnisend reveals that side hustles in 2026 are less about passion projects and more about financial necessity. In a survey of 1,370 Americans, 28% report currently having a side hustle, and four-in-five (80%)admit they started for financial reasons rather than personal fulfillment or fun. Among those with side hustles:

headline: Why Did ARM, SLS, EBAY Stocks Surge To 52-Week Highs?
summary: Arm Holdings surged more than 15%, while Sellas Life Sciences rallied by over 18% and eBay climbed up 4% at close.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock on Our Buy List and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.
